title: goulardia curvatiformis
intro: Goulardia curvatiformis, also known as Goulart's grass or goulardia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Goulardia curvatiformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Goulardia curvatiformis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
